case_title: BRIAN KEITH WICKER VS. DANIEL WHITTAKER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WICKER, BRIAN KEITH
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-26-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-11-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
